variants: Yohan Aditya graduated from Wavecrest School of Design, where he developed his skills and passion for cartography. He holds a Glyphwave Cartographer License, certifying his proficiency in the field. His scholarly work has been published in the Waxwing Folio, contributing to the discourse in cartography and design. In addition to his professional achievements, Yohan serves as a Representative for Buckthorne Peace Association, actively engaging in community development. In his work, he utilizes Dutch grammar, which enhances his communication within the industry.
